summary: Iter 31: Verified 48h soft-delete + restore + SMS batch scan + permissions state + onboarding wizard + settings profile & permissions + PermissionsBanner. 14/14 backend tests pass. Frontend end-to-end (signup → PIN → onboarding wizard w/ warm greeting → walkthrough → dashboard with permissions banner → Settings profile card + permissions rows + danger zone → wipe → login shows pending-deletion panel with hours remaining → Restore button → logged back in) all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: auth_intel.py wipe endpoint: subscription reactivation on restore uses filter {deactivated_by_soft_delete_at: {$exists: true}} — correct, only reactivates subscriptions deactivated by the soft-delete (not ones the user cancelled independently). Solid.
auth_intel.py signup: on stale ghost (grace elapsed but purge not yet run) inline hard-purge before allowing fresh signup — good, prevents Pro tier inheritance.
onboarding.py permissions: POST /permissions/state persists per-field {field}_updated_at timestamps as ISO strings — nice audit trail.

OnboardingPermissions.jsx step 4: onboarding-finish only marks server-side complete via Onboarding.markComplete(). If that fails silently the localStorage flag still sets, which is intentional (client is source of truth for the wizard visibility).
test_credentials: Ad-hoc TEST_*@example.com throwaway users created via /api/auth/signup; reviewer@perkworth.com was NOT touched.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* accounts created during pytest; several were wiped in tests. No cleanup needed — 48h purge cron will hard-delete them.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_soft_delete_and_onboarding.py (loads BASE_URL from /app/frontend/.env directly since REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL isn't in shell env). To reproduce frontend flow: clear localStorage first (page.evaluate('localStorage.clear()')) then reload BEFORE testing onboarding — otherwise stale perk_orbit_perms_onboarded flag skips the wizard. IMPORTANT: The onboarding-skip-all button uses the text 'Skip' — do NOT click by 'Skip' text alone (also matches Walkthrough's 'Skip tour'). Use data-testid selectors exclusively.

backend: login post-wipe → pending_deletion=true, hours_remaining, NO access_token
restore-account correct pwd → restored=true + access_token; subsequent login normal
restore-account for active user → already_active=true + access_token
GET /permissions/state → shape with permissions{} + onboarding_completed bool
POST /onboarding/scan-sms with mixed messages → filters personal 10-digit sender, returns keyword_hits + new_candidates
frontend: OnboardingPermissions screen appears with 'Welcome, Priya.' greeting
onboarding-start → perm-sms → perm-sms-secondary → perm-notif → perm-notif-secondary → onboarding-finish all wire up correctly
PermissionsBanner shows on dashboard when SMS=false with 'we can't auto-scan' copy + Enable/Not now/Don't ask again
SettingsPage 'Hi, Priya 👋' greeting + name field prepopulated + Save
Settings permissions card with perm-row-sms/notif/photos + toggles that POST to /permissions/state
Settings danger zone with 48-hour grace period copy and Restore my account language
Login post-wipe → pending-deletion-panel showing '47 hours left' + Restore/Keep deleted buttons
restore-account-btn → user is logged back in
